gaps.description: grep standalone no-match returns exit code 0 — exitCodeFor('') returns 0 but UNIX convention requires exit 1 for no match. Pipe context correctly returns 1 (line 180), but non-pipe grep does not. Ref: EXPECTED_DBB DBB-grep-002, DBB-grep-008
